back_translation: Now regarding the matter of the collection-offering for the saints, please do as I instructed the churches in the province of Galatia to do likewise.
On the first day of the week, let each one of you set aside at himself, saving up according to whatever he has prospered in, so that no further collections will need to be made when I come.
When I arrive, I will send letters with those whom you have approved, in order that they may carry your offering to the city of Jerusalem.
And if it is fitting that I myself should also go, they will travel with me.
I will come to you all when I have traveled through the province of Macedonia, because I will be passing through Macedonia.
And perhaps I will stay with you for a while, or even reside through the entire winter season, so that you all may send me on to wherever I am going next.
Because I do not want to see you all at this time as merely a passing visit; but I hope to remain with you for some time, if the (royal) Lord allows.
But I will stay in the city of Ephesus until the festival of Pentecost.
Because a great and open door for fruitful work has opened for me, even though there are many opposing-adversaries.
If Timothy comes to visit, please make sure that he is with you all without needing to fear anything; because he is also doing the work of the (royal) Lord, just like me.
Therefore, do not let anyone treat him with contempt. Send him on his way in peace, in order that he may return to me; because I am awaiting him together with the other brothers.

Now regarding our brother Apollos: I have urged him very much to come to you all together with the other brothers; but he was not at all willing to come at this time. He will go when there is a fitting opportunity.
Be on guard. Stand firm in the faith. Be courageous. Be strong.
Let everything you all do be in love.

All you brothers and sisters, I urge you — you all know the household of Stephanas, that they are the firstfruits of the province of Achaia, and they have devoted themselves in service to the holy ones —
in order that you all may be in submission to such ones, and to everyone who works together and toils.
I am glad concerning the arrival of Stephanas, Fortunatus, and Achaicus; because they have made up for the part that was lacking from you.
Because they have given rest to my heart-mind and to your heart-minds. Therefore acknowledge such persons with appreciation.

The churches in the province of Asia send their greetings to you all. Aquila and Prisca send their greetings to you all greatly in the (royal) Lord, together with the church that meets in their house.
All the brothers and sisters here send their greetings to you all. Greet one another with a holy kiss.
This greeting is written by my own hand — Paul.
If anyone does not love the (royal) Lord, let that one be cursed. "Marana-tha" (O our Lord, please come!)
May the grace of Jesus our (royal) Lord abide with all of you.
May my love abide with all of you in Jesus Christ.
